Katiya brings Aldrin face-to-face with the reality of the approaching threat, and Jade and Aliaki reinforce what she has forced him to witness. When the Royal Knights arrive, Aldrin calls them off and chooses to bet on Katiya's madness being the truth.

Cody drives home in his suit with his father's technician shirt over it, unsure whether his presentation changed anything. What he does know is that Katiya still needs him, and that is enough to make his next decision.

With no time to be formally legitimized, Katiya throws herself into directing the defense in mixed common clothes and Guard armor. She distributes comms, coordinates with Aldrin, and begins leading people more powerful than she is.

Cody bundles himself in Jackson's old camo jacket, carries the drone into Katiya's world, and takes up overwatch from a tower. His voice over comms is shaky, but he is there, and that matters to Katiya more than she wants to admit.

Katiya executes a defense that mirrors the exam she once failed, and this time Cody's drone gives her the advantage she needs. Even as comms begin to falter in the storm, it feels for one dangerous moment like they may actually survive this.
